name: Ca na Pilar
description: A Menorcan house some two hundred years old at the entrance to Es Migjorn Gran, with just a few tables and market-driven cooking that treats seasonal local produce with French touches, between tradition and creativity. At the helm is Víctor Lidón, a chef trained in starred houses such as ABaC, Zafferano (London) and Racó de Can Fabes, who came back to Menorca to build a project of his own. Michelin Guide recommended in 2025 and 2026.

practicalInfo.acceso: At the entrance to the village of Es Migjorn Gran.
practicalInfo.horario: Seasonal; confirm days and hours on the official website before going.
practicalInfo.servicios: Book via the official website (phone number listed there).

seo.description: Ca na Pilar (Es Migjorn Gran): market cooking with French touches by chef Víctor Lidón in a two-hundred-year-old Menorcan house, Michelin Guide recommended 2026.
